title: Iwanowice, Kraków County
summary:
Iwanowice [ivanɔˈvit͡sɛ] is a village in Kraków County, Lesser Poland Voivodeship, in southern Poland. It is the seat of the gmina (administrative district) called Gmina Iwanowice.


== References ==
